---
title: "Do AI Adoption Signals Predict Company Performance?"
author: "CMU AI Capstone × Larridin"
format: html
---

# Abstract

# 1. Introduction

# 2. Data

# 3. Signal Construction

# 4. Methodology

# 5. Results

# 6. Robustness and Bias Analysis

# 7. Dashboard and Decision Intelligence System

# 8. Limitations

# 9. Conclusion
